review_notes: This entry is a reviewed summary of the d4486eb 211 aggregate verifier output, not a raw runtime dump.
The API and worker containers reported image ai-platform:d4486eb-observability-evidence-loader with source revision and OCI revision labels pointing to d4486eb before the smoke was recorded.

The reviewed summary omits credentials, connection strings, object locators, workspace filesystem paths, executor-only internals, run identifiers, file identifiers, artifact identifiers, storage locators, real user identifiers, runtime env-file paths, and personal workstation paths.

The smoke confirms the context snapshot public projection reports summary_source=chat_stream and safe input_keys including attachments and message for a file-backed run without leaking raw material IDs or forbidden projection terms.
Inherited runtime-subject/runtime-rollout/source_revision alias labels and the external env-file compose label remain stale, so this evidence must not be used as G0 source-authority closure.

This evidence refreshes the Foundation Alpha POC runtime loop for d4486eb only. It does not close packaged frontend image release acceptance, signed Skill package/SBOM, production concurrency, Docker sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, or Foundation Alpha.
